query:
UPDATE employees e
INNER JOIN vacation_periods vp ON vp.employeeId = e.id
SET e.status = 'Ferias'
WHERE vp.status = 'em_gozo'
AND vp.deletedAt IS NULL
AND e.status = 'Ativo'
AND e.deletedAt IS NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute UPDATE employees e
INNER JOIN vacation_periods vp ON vp.employeeId = e.id
SET e.status = 'Ferias'
WHERE vp.status = 'em_gozo'
AND vp.deletedAt IS NULL
AND e.status = 'Ativo'
AND e.deletedAt IS NULL;
